title: lampranthus variabilis
intro: Lampranthus variabilis, also known as the living rock, is a succulent plant species in the genus Lampranthus. It is native to the Western Cape region of South Africa and is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional African medicine. The plant contains compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids, which are reported to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, contributing to its potential health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, Lampranthus variabilis is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and optimal dosage.
